creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
(In reply to Adriaan de Groot from comment #4)

I did not check further on this problem. I realised, that on other installations of the very same kind (CURRENT, recent ports tree, make built ports, but with py36 instead of py35) this error didn't occur.

After deinstalling python35 and trying to rebuild blender again (beginning of September or so), everything went fine.

So, with fresh installations things seem to run pretty smooth compared to "evolving" installations.

I close this and mark it "overcome by events". Recent blender, as of today, build fine on CURRENT/ALPHA8.
